commands.repair_reason: The remaining blockers are concrete, isolated PR-branch repairs in Google Chat thread normalization and tool-context state, with clear focused regression paths.; Needs attention: No CI, dependency-source, secret, or package-resolution expansion was found, but the thread rewrite can misroute explicit Google Chat replies into the wrong thread.; Review finding: [P2] Reject arbitrary message-resource reply targets in de... commands.review_summary:
The PR carries Google Chat thread-resource metadata through webhook context, auto-reply/block delivery, message-tool routing, send validation, auth transport, regression tests, and the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main lacks MessageThreadId at Google Chat ingress and forwards raw replyToId values into Google Chat thread.name. I did not run a live Google Chat webhook in this read-only review, but the current-main path and PR regression targets are clear.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are concrete, isolated PR-branch repairs in Google Chat thread normalization and tool-context state, with clear focused regression paths.
